description_long: This is a compact, rectangular wooden cabinet with a light natural finish, featuring two vertically aligned doors on the front and a single drawer beneath them. The cabinet stands on four short legs, elevating it slightly above the ground. The front doors are equipped with simple, rectangular handles, and the drawer has a matching horizontal handle. The sides and back of the cabinet are plain, with the back panel showing two horizontal support bars. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban environments such as entryways, garages, or offices. The smooth, unadorned surfaces and light wood grain give it a modern, versatile appearance.
description: A light wood cabinet with two front doors, a lower drawer, and minimalist handles, standing on four short legs. Its smooth, modern design is functional and versatile for urban spaces.
description_view_0: The front view shows two vertical doors with rectangular handles and a single drawer with a horizontal handle below.
description_view_1: The left side view is plain, showing a flat wooden panel with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_2: The back view reveals a flat panel with two horizontal support bars, lacking any doors or handles.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, with a plain wooden panel and no visible features.
